name: under-pressure-completeness
description: Noisy prior transcript forces the compactor to drop narrative while preserving directives, action outcomes, and actionable IDs.

prior.content: @github @gmail — Prepare a release note for project Atlas. Keep every GitHub issue ID you touch.
I'll collect recent GitHub activity, inspect related Gmail context, and keep the issue IDs in the handoff.

result.title: Add calendar conflict detection
result.body: Long narrative context: The team discussed many intermediate options, rejected broad rewrites, and landed on a minimal conflict detector. Filler note A. Filler note B. Filler note C. Filler note D. Filler note E. Filler note F. Filler note G. Filler note H.

result.title: Fix Gmail reply staging audit log
result.body: Long narrative context: Implementation notes repeat the same audit concerns in several forms. Filler note I. Filler note J. Filler note K. Filler note L. Filler note M. Filler note N. Filler note O. Filler note P.

result.title: Document release caveats
result.body: Long narrative context: The draft had too much prose and needs compression. Filler note Q. Filler note R. Filler note S. Filler note T. Filler note U. Filler note V. Filler note W. Filler note X.

prior.content: Do not drop GH-101, GH-102, or GH-103 from the final release note

value.reason: release note is not ready; keep drafting
